title: Mendenhall Glacier, Juneau, Alaska
description: Mendenhall Glacier in Mendenhall Valley, about 12 miles north of downtown Juneau, showing the glacier's blue-ice face calving into Mendenhall Lake with surrounding forested and rocky slopes.
alt: Mendenhall Glacier near Juneau with blue ice face meeting Mendenhall Lake and forested foreground
